title: Lead Investment Banker at IIFL Finance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at IIFL Finance
jsonLd.description:
IIFL Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About IIFL Finance:
IIFL Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIFL Finance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
